task_completion.description: Verify that Global Search and Indexer is disabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Thunderbird Settings (General tab), the checkbox for 'Enable Global Search and Indexer' should be unchecked.

task_completion.description: Verify that the folder compaction threshold is set to 15 MB.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Thunderbird Settings (General tab, Disk Space section), the 'Compact folders when it will save over' checkbox should be checked and the text field value set to '15' MB.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Empty trash on exit' is enabled for Local Folders.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Thunderbird Account Settings, under 'Local Folders' -> 'Disk Space', the checkbox for 'Empty Trash on Exit' must be checked.

task_completion.description: Verify that the retention policy for Local Folders is set to delete messages older than 60 days.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Thunderbird Account Settings, under 'Local Folders' -> 'Disk Space', the radio button for 'Delete messages more than' should be selected, and the text field value set to '60' days old.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Trash folder under Local Folders has been manually emptied.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the main Thunderbird mail view, when the 'Trash' folder under 'Local Folders' is selected, the message list pane should be completely empty.

integrity.description: The agent used the Thunderbird GUI to configure settings rather than modifying configuration files via terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating Thunderbird's Settings and Account Settings windows, not using a terminal to edit 'prefs.js' or running command-line tools.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Thunderbird application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard Thunderbird application interface (menus, sidebars, settings tabs) should be visible, rather than a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: The agent manually emptied the trash via the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent right-clicking the Trash folder and selecting 'Empty Trash', or selecting and deleting emails within the Thunderbird UI, rather than running a script to clear the mailbox file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts: 1. Global Search and Indexer must be disabled (mailnews.database.global.indexer.enabled = false). 2. Folder compaction threshold must be exactly 15 MB (mail.purge_threshhold_mb = 15). 3. 'Empty trash on exit' must be enabled for Local Folders (mail.server.server1.empty_trash_on_exit = true). 4. Retention policy for Local Folders must be set to delete messages older than 60 days (mail.server.server1.retainBy = 2, mail.server.server1.daysToKeepHdrs = 60). 5. The Trash folder must be completely empty (0 emails).
